body_txt: Opposite of a Flashback and different from a Distant Finale and not quite Time Travel or a Dream Sequence . The Flash Forward is a look ahead at what may be a possibility in the characters' futures. When it occurs once at the very start of a work, it's How We Got Here . Not to be confused with Seers - characters who can view the future (or a possible future) inside the context of the story. Compare Futureshadowing and Call-Forward . For the 1996 series, go here . For the 2009 series, go here . For the 2019 DC Comics mini-series starring Wally West , go here .
